blocks.content: His mom was making dinner when he got home. The kitchen smelled like the thing she made on Fridays — pasta, garlic, the radio low — and Kit dropped his backpack at the door and stood in the kitchen doorway for a second.
She looked at him over her shoulder and smiled.
He set the table without being asked.
After dinner he went upstairs and opened AIM. Daisy was online. Brooke was online too.
He clicked on his own screen name and changed his away message. Sat back. Looked at it.
It said: i'll always come find you.
Across town, a buddy list refreshed. A status changed. Someone read it and didn't respond.
